attributes.description: Workload monitoring with Deployments, DaemonSets, StatefulSets, Jobs, container restart trends, and deployment drilldowns.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts. MAX(k8s.container.restarts) per pod+container, then SUM.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50 , ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| sort timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50 , ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| sort timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

embeddableConfig.description: Deployment replica trend. SUM(k8s.deployment.available) vs SUM(k8s.deployment.desired) per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Deployment replicas over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    Ready = SUM(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50 , ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| sort timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    Ready = SUM(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50 , ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| sort timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

embeddableConfig.description: DaemonSet scheduling trend. SUM of desired, scheduled, and ready nodes per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSet scheduling over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
       k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
    BY timestamp, k8s.deployment.name
| Where total_restarts > 0
| SORT total_restarts DESC

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
       k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
    BY timestamp, k8s.deployment.name
| Where total_restarts > 0
| SORT total_restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Container restarts over time per deployment. max(k8s.container.restarts) broken down by k8s.deployment.name.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 deployments by container restarts

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy_doc = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy_doc == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep_deploy = CASE(
    is_deploy_doc == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy_doc == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep_deploy == 1
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired),
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy_doc = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy_doc == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep_deploy = CASE(
    is_deploy_doc == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy_doc == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep_deploy == 1
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired),
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability ASC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: Deployment listing with available/desired counts, availability percentage, and restarts. Drills down to Deployment Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Deployments

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.daemonset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name      = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    current      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready        = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes),
    misscheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.misscheduled_nodes)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT misscheduled DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.daemonset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name      = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    current      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready        = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes),
    misscheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.misscheduled_nodes)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT misscheduled DESC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: DaemonSet listing with scheduled/desired/ready/misscheduled node counts.
embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSet

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.statefulset.desired_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.statefulset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current = MAX(k8s.statefulset.current_pods),
    desired = MAX(k8s.statefulset.desired_pods),
    ready   = MAX(k8s.statefulset.ready_pods),
    updated = MAX(k8s.statefulset.updated_pods)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_ready = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(ready, 0),
    not_updated = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(updated, 0)
| SORT not_ready DESC, availability ASC, not_updated DESC, k8s.statefulset.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.statefulset.desired_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.statefulset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current = MAX(k8s.statefulset.current_pods),
    desired = MAX(k8s.statefulset.desired_pods),
    ready   = MAX(k8s.statefulset.ready_pods),
    updated = MAX(k8s.statefulset.updated_pods)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_ready = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(ready, 0),
    not_updated = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(updated, 0)
| SORT not_ready DESC, availability ASC, not_updated DESC, k8s.statefulset.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: StatefulSet listing with current/desired/ready/updated pod counts.
embeddableConfig.title: StatefulSets

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.job.active_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.job.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    active     = MAX(k8s.job.active_pods),
    successful = MAX(k8s.job.successful_pods),
    failed     = MAX(k8s.job.failed_pods),
    desired    = MAX(k8s.job.desired_successful_pods)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| EVAL
    completion = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(successful) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    remaining = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(successful, 0)
| SORT failed DESC, remaining DESC, completion ASC, k8s.job.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.job.active_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.job.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    active     = MAX(k8s.job.active_pods),
    successful = MAX(k8s.job.successful_pods),
    failed     = MAX(k8s.job.failed_pods),
    desired    = MAX(k8s.job.desired_successful_pods)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| EVAL
    completion = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(successful) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    remaining = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(successful, 0)
| SORT failed DESC, remaining DESC, completion ASC, k8s.job.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: Job listing with active/successful/failed/desired pod counts.
embeddableConfig.title: Jobs

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.replicaset.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.replicaset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.replicaset.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.replicaset.desired)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.replicaset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_available = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(available, 0)
| SORT not_available DESC, availability ASC, k8s.replicaset.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.replicaset.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.replicaset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.replicaset.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.replicaset.desired)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.replicaset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_available = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(available, 0)
| SORT not_available DESC, availability ASC, k8s.replicaset.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: Replicaset listing with current/desired/ready/updated pod counts.
embeddableConfig.title: Replicasets

attributes.title: [OTEL][Kubernetes] Workloads
